zh.lifeSummary: 當Jana de Clopton於大約1420年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓時，她的父親William Clopton35歲，母親Alice de Besford35歲。她於從1435年1月10日到1436年1月9日與John de Burgh III在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。她去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jana de Clopton于大约1420年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓时，她的父亲William Clopton35岁，母亲Alice de Besford35岁。她于从1435年1月10日到1436年1月9日与John de Burgh III在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓结婚。他们至少是6个女儿的父母。她去世在英国。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Jana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Distinctively feminine variant of   Jan ;  in the English-speaking world a 20th-century importation from Eastern Europe.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jana de Clopton was born about 1420, in Clopton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Clopton, was 35 and her mother, Alice de Besford, was 35. She married John de Burgh III from 10 January 1435 to 9 January 1436, in Clopton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. She died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jana de Clopton est née environ 1420, à Clopton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Clopton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice de Besford, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John de Burgh III du 10 janvier 1435 au 9 janvier 1436, à Clopton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jana de Clopton um 1420 in Clopton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Clopton 35 und ihre Mutter Alice de Besford 35. Sie hat von 10. Januar 1435 bis 9. Januar 1436 in Clopton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom John de Burgh III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. Sie starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jana de Clopton è nata il circa 1420 nel Clopton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Clopton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice de Besford, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John de Burgh III da 10 gennaio 1435 a 9 gennaio 1436, nel Clopton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. Morì nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jana de Cloptonが約1420年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアクロプトンで生まれた時，父William Cloptonは35歳，母Alice de Besfordは35歳であった。から1435年1月10日まで1436年1月9日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアクロプトンでJohn de Burgh IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jana de Clopton(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 클로프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Clopton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Besford(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1435년 1월 10일부터 1436년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 클로프턴에서 John de Burgh III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.1435: de 10 de janeiro de 1435 a 9 de janeiro de 1436
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jana de Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Clopton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Clopton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Besford, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Burgh III de 10 de janeiro de 1435 a 9 de janeiro de 1436, em Clopton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jana de Clopton родилась около 1420 г. в местности клоптон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Clopton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Besford, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Burgh III с 10 января 1435 по 9 января 1436 в местности клоптон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Она умерла в местности Англия.
